title: lithospermum leonotis
intro: Lithospermum leonotis, also known as leadwort, is a flowering plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of leadwort include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Leadwort is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use, and it can also be found in some topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
